# truenas_pools (Data Source)

Lists all ZFS pools on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_pools" "all" {}

output "pool_names" {
  value = [for p in data.truenas_pools.all.pools : p.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `pools` (Attributes List) List of ZFS pools. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pools))

<a id="nestedatt--pools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pools`

Read-Only:

- `guid` (String) Pool GUID.
- `healthy` (Boolean) Whether the pool is healthy.
- `id` (Number) Pool ID.
- `is_decrypted` (Boolean) Whether the pool is decrypted.
- `name` (String) Pool name.
- `path` (String) Pool mount path.
- `status` (String) Pool status.
